FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fe426c8b600>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:39:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:37:54Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/12 21:41:11.751352650 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751359510 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751389355 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751390176 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751408803 {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751409675 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751420040 new <- list()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751420601 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751429664 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751430215 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751444226 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751445087 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751461701 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751462523 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751476183 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751477164 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751488010 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751488461 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751497264 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751497705 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751506848 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751507339 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751516342 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751516783 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751531655 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751532576 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751543052 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751552315 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751553117 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751566476 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751566887 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751584132 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751584623 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751594247 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751594668 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751607627 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751608598 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751619124 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751630781 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751631542 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751645383 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751645854 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751657411 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751657891 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751669118 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751669559 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751683359 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751684180 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751699663 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751707695 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751708626 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751719372 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751719823 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751730549 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751731019 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751740543 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751741034 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751750128 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751750608 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751764128 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751765100 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751775946 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751787303 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751788034 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751805710 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751806221 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751815184 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751815634 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751825409 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751825850 version <- old$version
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751834302 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751834763 "2.0")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751847471 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751848273 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751865628 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751866339 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751883274 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751884056 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751900149 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751900610 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751911116 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751911556 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751931456 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751932237 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751949402 invisible()

2026/05/12 21:41:11.751352650 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751359510 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751389355 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751390176 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751408803 {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751409675 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751420040 new <- list()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751420601 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751429664 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751430215 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751444226 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751445087 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751461701 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751462523 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751476183 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751477164 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751488010 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751488461 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751497264 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751497705 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751506848 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751507339 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751516342 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751516783 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751531655 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751532576 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751543052 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751552315 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751553117 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751566476 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751566887 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751584132 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751584623 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751594247 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751594668 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751607627 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751608598 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751619124 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751630781 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751631542 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751645383 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751645854 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751657411 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751657891 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751669118 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751669559 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751683359 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751684180 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751699663 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751707695 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751708626 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751719372 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751719823 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751730549 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751731019 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751740543 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751741034 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751750128 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751750608 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751764128 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751765100 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751775946 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751787303 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751788034 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751805710 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751806221 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751815184 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751815634 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751825409 }
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751825850 version <- old$version
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751834302 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751834763 "2.0")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751847471 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751848273 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751865628 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751866339 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751883274 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751884056 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751900149 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751900610 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751911116 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751911556 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751931456 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751932237 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751949402 invisible()
2026/05/12 21:41:11.751950173 }
